leaseholdChart.pvBahtNote: All values in today's PV baht

lb.totalArea: Total land area of the project in Sq.Wa, derived from the property group's title deeds.
lb.sellingArea: Selling Area = Selling Area % × Total Area. Typical range: 50–70% of total area. Highlighted red when outside this band.
lb.publicUtilityArea: Public Utility Area = Public Utility Area % × Total Area. Covers roads, parks, and common infrastructure allocated to the project.
lb.totalRevenue: Sum of all unit selling prices from the uploaded unit details file.
lb.estSalesPeriod: Estimated Sales Duration = Total Units ÷ Sales Rate (houses/month). This duration is also used as the horizon for the Discount Rate Factor.
lb.publicUtilityConstruction: Total Cost = Rate (Baht/Sq.Wa) × Total Project Area. Enter the construction rate per square wah for public utility work.
lb.landFilling: Total Cost = Rate (Baht/Sq.Wa) × Total Project Area. Enter the land-filling rate per square wah.
lb.contingencyDev: Contingency Amount = Contingency % × Total Project Development Costs. Accounts for unforeseen development expenses. Default 3%.
lb.estConstructionPeriod: Estimated Construction Duration = Total Units ÷ Build Rate (houses/month). This duration feeds into Professional Fee and Admin Cost totals.
lb.allocationPermitFee: One-time government permit fee for land allocation. Entered as a fixed Baht amount.
lb.landTitleFee: Total Fee = Fee per Plot × Number of Plots (equals total units). Enter the fee charged per individual land title deed division.
lb.sellingAdv: Total = Selling & Advertising % × Total Project Revenue.
lb.contingencyProject: Contingency Amount = Contingency % × Total Project Cost Expenses. Default 3%.
lb.transferFee: Government land transfer fee. Total = Transfer Fee % × Total Revenue.
lb.specificBizTax: Specific Business Tax (SBT) on property transfer. Total = SBT % × Total Revenue.
lb.riskPremium: Developer's risk allowance. Total = Risk Premium % × Total Revenue.
lb.currentPropertyValue: Current Property Value = Total Revenue − Total Development Costs and Expenses.
lb.discountRate: Annual discount rate (%). Enter 0 to skip time-value adjustment. Applied over the estimated sales duration.
lb.discountRateFactor: Discount Factor = 1 / (1 + Discount Rate / 100) ^ (Sales Duration / 12). Converts the future current property value back to a present-day value.
lb.finalPropertyValue: Final Property Value = Current Property Value × Discount Rate Factor.
lb.totalAssetValueRounded: Final property value rounded to the nearest 10,000 Baht.
lb.totalAssetValuePerSqWa: Total asset value divided by the selling area (Sq.Wa), rounded to the nearest 100 Baht.

condo.areaTitleDeed: Land area per title deed in Sq.Wa. Automatically converted to Sq.M by multiplying × 4.
condo.far: Floor Area Ratio (FAR) from the city plan. Construction Area per city plan = Land Area (Sq.M) × FAR.
condo.totalBuildingArea: Total gross floor area of the building in Sq.M, entered by the appraiser. This is the basis for the building construction cost calculation.
condo.commonArea: Common Area = Total Building Area − Indoor Sales Area. Common Area % = 100% − Indoor Sales Area %.
condo.indoorSalesArea: Sourced from the active unit-detail upload: total usable area of all units.
condo.projectSalesArea: Net sellable area — equals the Indoor Sales Area from the unit-detail upload.
condo.averageSellingPrice: Average Price per Sq.M = Total Selling Price ÷ Project Sales Area.
condo.totalRevenue: Total project revenue (GDV) sourced from the unit-detail upload: sum of all unit selling prices.
condo.estSalesDuration: User-entered duration in months over which all units are expected to be sold. Used as the horizon for the Discount Rate Factor.
condo.condoBuildingCost: Total = Construction Rate (Baht/Sq.M) × Total Building Area.
condo.setAvgRoomSize: Total units from the unit-detail upload. Average Indoor Area per Unit = Indoor Sales Area ÷ Total Units.
condo.furniture: Total = Furniture Cost per Unit × Number of Units (from the unit-detail upload).
condo.externalUtilities: Fixed cost for utilities and infrastructure outside the building. MAO (Maximum Allowable Outcome) constraint applies.
condo.hardCostContingency: Contingency = Contingency % × (Building Construction Cost + Project Development Costs). Default 3%.
condo.estConstructionPeriod: Duration in months for the construction phase. Used to compute Professional Fee and Admin Cost totals.
condo.sellingAdv: Total = Selling & Advertising % × Total Project Income.
condo.titleDeedFee: Fixed fee for issuance of individual condominium title deeds (Chanote).
condo.eiaCost: Fixed cost for the Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) report required for large condominium projects.
condo.condoRegistrationFee: Fixed government fee to register the condominium juristic person.
condo.otherExpenses: Total = Other Expenses % × Total Project Cost Expenses (soft cost subtotal).
condo.transferFee: Government land transfer fee. Total = Transfer Fee % × Total Project Income. Default 1%.
condo.specificBizTax: Specific Business Tax (SBT). Total = SBT % × Total Project Income.
condo.riskProfit: Developer's expected risk and profit margin. Total = Risk & Profit % × Total Project Income.
condo.totalRemainingValue: Total Remaining Value = Total Revenue − Total Development Costs.
condo.discountRate: Annual discount rate (%). Enter 0 to skip time-value adjustment. Applied over the estimated sales duration.
condo.discountRateFactor: Discount Factor = 1 / (1 + Discount Rate / 100) ^ (Sales Duration / 12). Converts the future remaining value back to a present-day value.
condo.finalRemainingValue: Final Remaining Value = Total Remaining Value × Discount Rate Factor.
condo.totalAssetValueRounded: Final remaining value rounded to the nearest 10,000 Baht.
condo.totalAssetValuePerSqM: Total asset value divided by indoor sales area (Sq.M), rounded to the nearest 100 Baht.
